zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux於1240年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme25歲，母親Alix de Beaumont Gatinais19歲。他於1288年與Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT在法國諾門迪奧內結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年12月9日在法國諾門迪艾哈爾庫特享年62歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利諾特-達-度-帕可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux于1240年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme25岁，母亲Alix de Beaumont Gatinais19岁。他于1288年与Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT在法国諾門迪奧內结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年12月9日在法国諾門迪艾哈爾庫特享年62岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利諾特-達-度-帕可。

nameMeanings.name: d'HARCOURT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux was born in 1240, in Normandy, France, his father, Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme, was 25 and his mother, Alix de Beaumont Gatinais, was 19. He married Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT in 1288, in Orne, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 9 December 1302, in Harcourt, Eure, Normandy, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux est né en 1240, à Normandie, France, son père, Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alix de Beaumont Gatinais, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT en 1288, à Orne, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 9 décembre 1302, à Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux 1240 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme 25 und seine Mutter Alix de Beaumont Gatinais 19. Er hat 1288 in Orne, Normandie, Frankreich Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Dezember 1302 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux è nato il nel 1240 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Beaumont Gatinais, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT nel 1288, nel Orne, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 dicembre 1302, nel Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preuxが1240年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Hommeは25歳，母Alix de Beaumont Gatinaisは19歳であった。1288年にフランスノーマンディオルンでJeanne de CHATELLERAULTと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年12月9日にフランスノーマンディエウアハーコウルトで62歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメノトレ-ダム-ドウ-パーックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux(이)가 1240년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Beaumont Gatinais(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1288년 프랑스 노먼디 른에서 Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 12월 9일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 하르쿠르트에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 노트레-다-드-파르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux nasceu em 1240, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Beaumont Gatinais, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT em 1288, em Orne, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1302, em Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux родился в 1240 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Beaumont Gatinais, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT в 1288 г. в местности орн, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 9 декабря 1302 г. в местности харкоурт, эур, норманди, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности нотре-дэме-ду-парк, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean d'HARCOURT II,  le Preux nació en 1240, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Jean d'HARCOURT Dit le Prud'Homme, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alix de Beaumont Gatinais, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Jeanne de CHATELLERAULT en 1288, en Orne, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1302, en Harcourt, Eure, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Notre-Dame-du-Parc, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
